# nodejs/node

Installs Node.js LTS (required for npx-based MCP servers)

## Key Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `node` | Run node |
| `node --help` | Show help and available options |
| `node --version` | Show installed version |

## Common Usage

```bash
# Check if installed
node --version

# Show help
node --help
```
